potential_regulatory_category: educational design-training tool with patient-connected-topic warnings
boundaries: This model is educational and proposal-facing.
Generated model behavior depends on explicit assumptions, component values, and solver configuration.

risks.risk: Student mistakes simulation for certified device behavior
risks.trigger: Any generated model or performance table
risks.mitigation: Display educational boundary and assumptions in every export.

risks.risk: Generated circuit omits patient isolation or leakage-current constraints
risks.mitigation: Warn that patient-connected hardware needs separate isolation, leakage, and EMC analysis.

risks.risk: LLM parse error becomes hidden design assumption
risks.trigger: Selected CLI structured spec drives model generation
risks.mitigation: Expose parsed spec, assumptions, ambiguities, and model-check status in Evidence Pack.
